goal: 让 cxs find 默认按需同步历史覆盖并简化 selector 使用

summary.title: 让 cxs find 默认按需同步历史覆盖
summary.what: CLI find 现在会在查询前为目标 public source 和 scope 执行增量同步，输出 autoSync 状态，并支持 --project 与 --no-sync；项目文档和发行版 cxs skill 同步改成以 find 为正常入口。
summary.why: 用户希望真实使用时 agent 不需要先理解 source、selector 或手动 coverage 流程；没有 watcher 的前提下，最小可用方案是让每次 find 主动刷新相关 source/scope。
summary.user_goal: 让 cxs find 默认按需同步历史覆盖并简化 selector 使用

decisions.chose: 让 find 在 CLI 层先调用 syncSessions，再进入 query 层
decisions.rationale: 这保留了 sync/indexer/query 的既有边界，同时把普通 agent 使用面简化成 find -> read。
rejected: 继续要求 agent 先 status 再按 recommendedAction 手动 sync

decisions.point: 默认无 scope 查询怎么同步
decisions.chose: 没有显式 scope 时同步每个 public source 的 all(defaultRoot)，但 querySelector 仍保持 null
decisions.rationale: 这样能刷新默认 raw roots，同时避免把查询限定死在默认 root，保留旧索引里其它 source_root 的历史可检索性。

decisions.point: strict sync 失败时如何处理真实使用
decisions.chose: source unavailable 记为 failed；其它 strict SyncError 自动重试 best-effort，并把状态写入 autoSync.entries
decisions.rationale: 真实 session root 可能有正在写入或暂时坏掉的文件，单个文件不应让 recall 完全不可用。

decisions.point: selector API 怎么对 agent 简化
decisions.chose: 新增 --project 作为用户友好 alias，保留 --cwd / --root / --selector 为兼容或高级入口；新增 --no-sync 作为只查现有索引的 escape hatch
decisions.rationale: 普通使用可以表达成项目范围，而调试、日期范围和既有脚本仍有稳定入口。

rejected.reason: 用户明确不想维护 watcher；按调用触发的增量同步能覆盖真实使用需求。

rejected.alternative: 把 status/source inventory 作为内容真相源
rejected.reason: 内容证据仍应来自 cxs index 与 read-range/read-page，raw inventory 只用于构造和诊断范围。

review_notes: Validation: npm run check passed after implementation and doc updates.
Smoke: fixture find from an empty temp DB auto-synced one Codex session and returned it.
Smoke: real crs0910 project-scoped find returned both claude-code and codex results with synced autoSync entries.
This commit updates source and skill package only; npm release, global skill installation, and local CLI update are not performed here.

architectural_claims: find-time sync is implemented in the CLI layer; query/findSessions remains read-only.
Source fanout still uses single-source find summaries plus reciprocal-rank merge.
autoSync is the find-time synchronization truth surface; coverage remains query-layer status.
behavioral_changes: cxs find auto-syncs selected public sources by default before searching.
cxs find --project scopes both sync and query to a project path.
zero-result find output now explains whether auto-sync already ran instead of always instructing status/sync.
text find output prints an auto-sync status line when stats are enabled.
security_implications: find now writes the local SQLite index by default, but still only scans local configured session roots and does not expose raw transcript roots as content evidence.
Best-effort auto-sync may index successful files while leaving complete coverage false; callers should inspect autoSync status before treating coverage as complete.
migration_notes: Existing scripts that need read-only find behavior should pass --no-sync.
